corrections_made_this_session: Fixed Aufrecht pada extraction bug (l.group(2)->l.group(3)) that truncated every pada to one letter.
Discovered VedaWeb embeds 9+ reference layers; only the Lubotsky layer is an independent base; VNH/aufrecht/zurich/oldenberg/geldner/etc are NON-independent and excluded.
Used the PADAPATHA (F-PADAPATHA, on disk) as the sandhi-resolved reference to isolate genuine lexical variants from sandhi/segmentation/accent differences.

Reconciled the 90 Aufrecht-only 'missing' verses: they are NOT missing; Aufrecht contains exactly 2 verses (9.97.35, 10.92.2) EXCLUDED by the Padapatha tradition (known appendix/interpolation verses).

collation_result.residual_differences: 100% located at external-sandhi junctions (a/o/r/h at morpheme boundaries) and accent placement; zero lexical/root substitutions observed
collation_result.three_way_check_Aufrecht_vs_Lubotsky_vs_: All pairwise differences are sandhi/segmentation convention, not lexical variants.
collation_result.interpretation: The Rigveda samhita is LEXICALLY STABLE across its two collatable independent editorial traditions (Aufrecht and Lubotsky). Observed differences are sandhi-application, word-segmentation, and accent-placement convention only.

falsification_of_prior_claims.status: REJECTED (VNH is Aufrecht-derived) then RE-TESTED on corrected 2-base set
CONFIRMED at lexical level across 2 independent bases + Padapatha; NOT certified 'complete' (only 2 of required >=3 independent bases collatable)
REQUALIFIED: available for 10,550 core verses; 2 Aufrecht-only verses (9.97.35,10.92.2) lie outside the Padapatha tradition

known_limitations: Only 2 of >=3 required independent samhita bases are collatable (Max Muller OCR on disk is garbled; Oldenberg-Schmidt / clean Max Muller / Baskala not yet acquired).
Automated sandhi normalization is heuristic; a full Vedic sandhi engine would be needed to reduce residual boundary diffs to exactly zero and produce a formal variant apparatus.
Sayana commentary, Baskala recension, and native-Unicode Devanagari sa Mihita not yet integrated.
quality_gate: EVIDENCE INCOMPLETE (per directive gate): every known family investigated & mapped, derivatives collapsed, but >=1 more independent base required before 'verified Digital Critical Edition' certification.
next_acquisitions: clean Max Muller text (3rd independent base)
